text: A gentle sense of reverence stirs within me as I walk these halls. The quiet modernity, softened by intention and design, feels almost sacred beneath the soft, artificial light. Wisdom seems to flow through both the empty spaces and the curated knowledge on display. Here, shadow and illumination mingle; I feel protected, contemplative, and oddly uplifted by the shade that these new temples of thought provide. This is a shelter for both body and mind—a rare blessing in a world loud with distraction.
